architecture.summary: New parseRepoIdentifier() in url-generator.ts, new cloneSingleGitHubRepo() in github-repo-cloning.ts, reuses existing clone worker and job launcher for background cloning

integrations.summary: GitHub REST API for repo validation (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}), same PAT resolution as bulk clone, SSH for git@ format inputs

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI feature, no UI. Error messages: 404 shows not found or no access hint. --repo takes precedence over --org/--pattern silently.

performance.summary: N/A - single repo clone, negligible performance concerns. Background job completes near-instantly for 1 repo.

security.summary: Same PAT handling as existing bulk clone. SSH format bypasses PAT. No new auth surface.

edge-cases.summary: Already-cloned repos skipped via existing pre-flight. --repo + --org conflict: --repo wins. Dry-run validates existence only. Invalid URL formats return parse error.
